basic_details.job_title: MPSC Group C Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 20 Bailiff and Clerk Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Maharashtra Public Service Commission (MPSC) - Maharashtra Government
basic_details.department: Mumbai Municipal Corporation (Sheriff) Office, Law and Judiciary Department
basic_details.total_vacancies: 20 (tentative; subject to change at the discretion of MPSC/Government)
basic_details.short_information: Maharashtra Public Service Commission (MPSC) has released Advertisement No. 015/2026 (Reference No. LJR-1926/P.No.24/2026/Advertisement) for the recruitment to the posts of Bailiff and Clerk, Group-C in Mumbai Municipal Corporation (Sheriff) Office under the Law and Judiciary Department of the Maharashtra Government. A total of 20 vacancies have been announced. The Commission will conduct the Bailiff and Clerk, Group-C Competitive Examination - 2026 for these appointments.

important_dates.1: Last date for submission of application
important_dates.2: Last date to pay examination fee online
important_dates.3: Last date to submit challan at State Bank of India for payment of examination fee
important_dates.4: Last date for payment of examination fee via challan

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 19 years Maximum Age: 43 years (General Category) Age Relaxation: PWD candidates are eligible for 43+3 years relaxation.

qualification.details: The following categories of Persons with Disabilities (Divyang) are eligible to apply for these posts: | 1) Low Vision 2) One Leg, One Arm, Spinal Deformity (SD) and Spinal Injury (SI) without any associated neurological/limb dysfunction, Leprosy Cured, Dwarfism, Acid Attack Victim 3) Autism Spectrum Disorder (Mild), Specific Learning Disability, Mental Illness 4) Multiple Disability involving (1) to (3) above | Educational Qualification | For Bailiff and Clerk, Group-C: | Degree Knowledge of Marathi language is required. Typing Qualification for Bailiff and Clerk Cadre: Marathi typing speed of at least 30 words per minute or English typing speed of at least 40 words per minute Government Commerce Certificate or Computer Typing Certificate Examination passed. A degree holder who requires internship or hands-on work experience in a workshop must have fulfilled this condition by the prescribed date of acceptance of applications. | Salary | Pay Scale: Rs. 19900-63200

selection_process: Selection will be made through a written competitive examination. The date of examination and the examination centre will be intimated separately through the registered Email ID of candidates and by uploading a circular on the MPSC website https://mpsc.gov.in.
Note: No TA/DA or reimbursement shall be made by MPSC for appearing in the selection process.
how_to_apply: Candidates must apply online only through the MPSC official portal https://mpsconline.gov.in. No application through post, Speed Post, Registered Post, Ordinary Post, or Couriers will be accepted.
Visit https://mpsconline.gov.in → Click on the relevant Advertisement No. 015/2026 → Click “Apply Now”.
Fill in all details correctly as per your original documents.
Upload required documents and pay the examination fee online.
Ensure the Email ID entered in the application form remains active until the recruitment process is completed.
Apply Online at: https://mpsconline.gov.in → Advertisement No. 015/2026 → Apply Now
For any queries, visit the official MPSC website: https://mpsc.gov.in

content_sections.heading: MPSC Bailiff & Clerk Group-C Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: A total of 20 vacancies (tentative) have been announced for the post of Bailiff and Clerk, Group-C in Mumbai Municipal Corporation (Sheriff) Office. The number of vacancies is subject to change at the sole discretion of MPSC/Government. *The vacancy figures are tentative and are subject to increase or decrease as per the requirement and decision of the Government/MPSC.

rows.mumbai_municipal_corporation_sheriff_off: Vacancy-wise category-wise social/parallel reservation details are as follows:

content_sections.heading: MPSC Bailiff & Clerk Group-C Recruitment 2026 - General Notes on Vacancies & Reservations
MPSC Bailiff & Clerk Group-C Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility
content_sections.text: The following categories of Persons with Disabilities (Divyang) are eligible to apply for these posts: 1) Low Vision 2) One Leg, One Arm, Spinal Deformity (SD) and Spinal Injury (SI) without any associated neurological/limb dysfunction, Leprosy Cured, Dwarfism, Acid Attack Victim 3) Autism Spectrum Disorder (Mild), Specific Learning Disability, Mental Illness 4) Multiple Disability involving (1) to (3) above Educational Qualification For Bailiff and Clerk, Group-C: Degree Knowledge of Marathi language is required. Typing Qualification for Bailiff and Clerk Cadre: Marathi typing speed of at least 30 words per minute or English typing speed of at least 40 words per minute Government Commerce Certificate or Computer Typing Certificate Examination passed. A degree holder who requires internship or hands-on work experience in a workshop must have fulfilled this condition by the prescribed date of acceptance of applications. Salary Pay Scale: Rs. 19900-63200

content_sections.heading: MPSC Bailiff and Clerk, Group-C Application Fee 2026
MPSC Bailiff and Clerk, Group-C Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 19 years Maximum Age: 43 years (General Category) Age Relaxation: PWD candidates are eligible for 43+3 years relaxation.

content_sections.heading: MPSC Bailiff & Clerk Group-C Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Stage 1 - Written Competitive Examination Selection will be made through a written competitive examination. The date of examination and the examination centre will be intimated separately through the registered Email ID of candidates and by uploading a circular on the MPSC website https://mpsc.gov.in . Note: No TA/DA or reimbursement shall be made by MPSC for appearing in the selection process.

content_sections.heading: MPSC Bailiff & Clerk Group-C Recruitment 2026 - How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates must apply online only through the MPSC official portal https://mpsconline.gov.in . No application through post, Speed Post, Registered Post, Ordinary Post, or Couriers will be accepted. Steps to Apply Online: For any queries, visit the official MPSC website: https://mpsc.gov.in

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for MPSC Bailiff and Clerk Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the MPSC Bailiff and Clerk posts is 07 July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for MPSC Bailiff and Clerk posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a degree (पदवी) and have knowledge of the Marathi language. Additionally, typing proficiency in Marathi or English is required, along with relevant certification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 19 years, and the maximum age limit is 43 years for the General category. Specific relaxations are available for Divyang candidates.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for MPSC Bailiff and Clerk Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 20 vacancies announced for the Bailiff and Clerk posts by the Maharashtra Public Service Commission.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the MPSC Bailiff and Clerk posts?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a salary in the pay scale of Rs. 19900-63200.

faq.question: Q6. Can candidates from outside Maharashtra apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The notification is for Maharashtra Public Service Commission, implying that candidates should meet the eligibility criteria set by MPSC, which may include domicile requirements. Please refer to the official notification for specifics.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided for certain categories, including PWD candidates who are eligible for 43+3 years relaxation. Specific details for other reserved categories should be checked in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification and the online application link are provided in the "Important Links" section of this article. You can also visit the official MPSC website for more details.
